title: chenopodium album subsp. viride
intro: Chenopodium album subsp. viride, also known as green goosefoot or green lamb's quarters, is a subspecies of the Chenopodium album plant, a member of the Chenopodiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chenopodium album subsp. viride include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing relief from digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
